message:
Command `
# Check groups count in log - how many total groups are there?
grep "Complete.*groups" "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"

echo ""
echo "=== Check full DRT log for any iteration start messages ==="
grep -E "(DRT-0195|DRT-0267|iteration|Start detail|Start 0th)" "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
` executed with exit code -1.
